trades.reasoning: TSLA is down -3.1% from avg cost with the weakest momentum score (75) of our holdings; rotating into CRWD which scores 95 and has stronger technical setup.
Highest momentum score (95) in the screened universe with MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20, making it the strongest rotational candidate.

decisions.briefing: Markets dipped modestly today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 off -0.6%, keeping sentiment neutral. Our portfolio holds up at +4.1% but TSLA has slipped -3.1% from cost and shows the weakest momentum of our three positions. We're rotating TSLA into CRWD, the top-ranked name on the screener, to keep the portfolio aligned with the strongest momentum leaders.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities slipped modestly on Tuesday with the NASDAQ and S&P 500 each losing 0.6%, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid ongoing uncertainty around tariff policy and mixed corporate guidance. Technology and growth stocks paused after recent strong recoveries, with traders taking a wait-and-see stance ahead of upcoming earnings reports from major tech names. Overall breadth was narrow, suggesting the pullback was more profit-taking than broad risk-off selling.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週二小幅回落，納斯達克指數與標普500指數各下跌0.6%，反映出投資者在關稅政策不確定性及企業業績指引參差不齊的背景下保持審慎態度。科技及成長型股票在近期強勁反彈後出現整固，市場靜待主要科技龍頭即將公布的季度業績。整體市場寬度偏窄，顯示此次回調性質更偏向獲利了結，而非全面避險情緒蔓延。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Portfolio rotation means selling a weaker-performing position and using the proceeds to buy a stronger one, without adding new cash. Investors do this to keep capital working in the highest-momentum names rather than sitting in laggards. Today we rotated out of TSLA (score 75, -3% drawdown) into CRWD (score 95, strong MACD crossover) to improve our portfolio's overall momentum profile.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「輪動（Portfolio Rotation）」是指賣出表現較弱的持倉，將資金轉投至動能更強的標的，而無需注入新資金。投資者透過輪動策略，確保資金持續部署於市場中最具動能的股票，避免資金滯留在落後者身上。今日我們將動能評分僅75分、已下跌3%的特斯拉（TSLA）換入評分高達95分、MACD金叉強勁的CrowdStrike（CRWD），以提升整體組合的動能質素。
